file_insights.details: Added ratatui 0.29, crossterm 0.28, nucleo 0.5 to dependencies; added insta 1.46.3 to dev-dependencies; added terminal_size 0.4.3 as a transitive requirement
Added 'mod ui;' declaration and wired new Ui subcommand variant in Command enum that calls ui::run_ui(&root).await
Created new UI module with stub run_ui() async function ready for implementation

23621 character diff showing transitive dependency resolution for TUI stack: 50+ new dependency entries including cassowary, crossterm_winapi, darling, insta, lru, nucleo-matcher, ratatui, rayon, signal-hook, strum, unicode utilities

patterns_discovered.description: ratatui (UI layout/rendering) + crossterm (terminal control) + nucleo (fuzzy matching) + terminal_size (introspection) = complete terminal UI toolkit
New Ui variant in Command enum uses .await syntax, indicating async/await runtime integration already present in dispatcher architecture
insta added to dev-dependencies for snapshot-based testing, suggests iterative UI refinement strategy with golden file comparisons
Single TUI framework addition brings in ~50 transitive deps (cassowary layout engine, unicode-* crates, rayon parallelism, signal-hook for event handling)

gotchas_discovered.description: Cargo.lock contains both linux-raw-sys 0.4.15 and 0.12.1. Normal for indirect dependencies but monitor for behavioral differences in rustix FFI calls
Both rustix 0.38.44 and 1.1.4 present in lock. crossterm uses 0.38.44 (newer), tempfile uses 1.1.4 (older). No known incompatibility but version skew exists
Both unicode-width 0.1.14 and 0.2.0 in lock file. ratatui uses 0.2.0, others may use 0.1.14. Should verify no breaking API changes between versions
ui::run_ui() is async but ratatui is typically synchronous blocking. Need to verify async/await integration doesn't deadlock event loop
crossterm requires explicit terminal enter/exit (raw mode, alternative screen). Dispatcher must handle panic cleanup and signal handling to restore terminal

approach_outcome.description: Successfully added all required TUI dependencies, created module structure, and wired Ui subcommand into dispatcher. Dependencies resolved cleanly with no conflicts. Module skeleton ready for iterative UI implementation. No blockers encountered.

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration test for Ui subcommand invocation (cli::run(Command::Ui { root: ... }).await) before implementing UI logic. Snapshot test initial frames via insta.
Document async/sync boundary between dispatcher (async tokio runtime) and ratatui (sync blocking). Consider tokio::task::spawn_blocking() wrapper if needed.
Add panic handler and signal handler (SIGINT, SIGTERM) in run_ui() to call crossterm::terminal::disable_raw_mode() and restore cursor before exit. Use Arc<Mutex> for shared terminal state.
Verify nucleo fuzzy matcher initialization cost (parking_lot locks, rayon thread pool). Profile startup latency for Ui subcommand cold start.
Monitor unicode-width and rustix version skew in future updates. Consider MSRV pinning if TUI crates raise MSRV (ratatui 0.29 may have platform-specific constraints).
Document mod ui/ architecture (layout engine, state machine, event handling) as placeholder comment in ui/mod.rs before implementation begins.
